title: Power Rangers Craft
description: Adds items, creatures and blocks from the beloved American adaptation of the Japanese Super Sentai Series since 1993!
body:
![PRC Splash Screen](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/10b7c09aca3f22baca16d1413ed974e4e56966ce_0.webp)
Since 1993, The Power Rangers Series has captivated people across the world with it's stories, characters, and it's 'tokusatsu' production techniques, most of which was taken from the Super Sentai Series. Now, over 30 years of American cultural icons arrives in Minecraft!

This mod started back in February 2025 when I asked LiasDan if I could work on the mod using existing Super Sentai Craft assets and code. With his permission, I have since added Power Rangers exclusive teams and items.

Collect items, assemble an arsenal of armors and weapons, and fight a variety of mobs! Every series and era of Power Rangers is represented in some form, including toy-exclusive and extra-canonical items and rangers!

 

You will need GeckoLib to use this mod.
[https://modrinth.com/mod/geckolib](https://modrinth.com/mod/geckolib)



_'Power Rangers' and related characters are owned by Hasbro, Inc. I do not make any claim to have created or own the concepts and designs shown in this mod. No profit has been made or will be made from this mod._
